module.name: src
module.purpose: Rust workspace source root for Marix crates with a flat Cargo crate layout plus prompt-template sources. It organizes the agent, client, common, prompt, host, first-class marix-protocol, and tool crates/modules; agent initial model steps render InitialPrompt from cloned task/tool session context, DeepSeek chat requests use the provider-supported user role, client sessions surface streamed StepEvent output and close nonblockingly, and prompt templates require raw strict JSON with single-string execution invocation inputs.

childModules.name: agent
childModules.purpose: Agent crate namespace for model/session/task/prompt orchestration; it renders initial model-step prompts through InitialPrompt using cloned tasks/tools session context and sends DeepSeek chat payloads with a user-role prompt message.

childModules.name: client
childModules.purpose: Client crate namespace for ClientSession and ClientEvent; it surfaces StepEvent updates/failures/non-streamed completions as client output and closes by dropping the worker handle without joining.

childModules.name: common
childModules.purpose: Shared common crate namespace for config loading, external adapters, logging, and structure utilities; protocol contracts have moved to the marix-protocol workspace crate.

childModules.name: prompt
childModules.purpose: Owns prompt templates used by model-facing steps, including raw strict JSON no-fence requirements and single-string execution invocation input guidance.

childModules.name: protocol
childModules.purpose: First-class marix-protocol workspace crate for reusable session, task, step, execution, and tool protocol definitions; TaskPreview now contains request/result only.

childModules.name: host
childModules.purpose: Host crate namespace for HostSession and host-side tool execution; it now imports shared protocol contracts from marix-protocol.

childModules.name: tool
childModules.purpose: Top-level marix-tool crate that defines ToolProgram and native tool executables; it now depends on marix-protocol for tool preview/schema protocol types.
